channel.title: GitHub Jsonnet Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Jsonnet in GitHub

item.title: kubernetes-monitoring/kubernetes-mixin
item.description: A set of Grafana dashboards and Prometheus alerts for Kubernetes.

item.title: prometheus-operator/kube-prometheus
item.description: Use Prometheus to monitor Kubernetes and applications running on Kubernetes

item.title: grafana/grafonnet-lib
item.description: Jsonnet library for generating Grafana dashboard files.

item.title: observatorium/observatorium
item.description: This repository contains the deployment configurations for the Observatorium instances

item.title: kubeflow/community
item.description: Information about the Kubeflow community including proposals and governance information.

item.title: projectsyn/component-rook-ceph
item.description: Commodore component to manage Rook.io rook-ceph operator, Ceph cluster, and CSI drivers

item.title: projectsyn/component-registry-cache
item.description: This is a Commodore Component for registry-cache
